LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 19, 2012 TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH THE MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT. MOTION TO BE FILED TODAY WITH THE OPPOSITION TO BE FILED BY APRIL 11, 2012. REPLY TO BE FILED BY APRIL 16, 2012. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO CONTINUE TO HOLD THE FUNDS OF $708.71 UNTIL THE MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DECIDED. 2 ORDERS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE THE $708.71 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND HEREAFTER TO REDUCE THE EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER TO $250 PER MONTH. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ISABEL RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Desiree D. Nguyen, Esq., of Hyde & Swigart, Tel. 415.495.7770, appearing for Defendant and Claimant.
Arash Khakshooy, Esq., of Kenosian & Miele, Tel. 310.289.0500, appearing for Plaintiff via Court Call.

The tentative ruling was not opposed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Isabel Rodriquez' Claim Of Exemption is Granted in part. The levying officer is directed to release the $708.71 to the judgment creditor and hereafter to reduce the earnings withholding order to $250 per month. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Continued To Apr-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DESIREE D. NGUYEN OF HYDE & SWIGART, TEL. NO. 495-7770 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is continued to APRIL 19, 2012 TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH THE MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT. MOTION TO BE FILED TODAY WITH THE OPPOSITION TO BE FILED BY APRIL 11, 2012. REPLY TO BE FILED BY APRIL 16, 2012. The levying officer is directed to continue to hold the funds of $708.71 until the motion to set aside default judgment is decided. 2 ORDERS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
